Read parents table

Source: R/data_io.R
read_parents.Rd

Read a table of candidate families with parent genotypes.

Usage

read_parents(file, genotype_matrix, sep = ",")

Arguments

file

Path to a CSV/TSV file with columns: family_id, sire_id, dam_id.

genotype_matrix

A genotype matrix (from read_genotype()) that includes sire and dam genotypes.

sep

Field separator (default: comma).

Value

A list of class aapa_parents, where each element is a list with family_id, sire_id, dam_id, sire_geno, dam_geno.

See also

Other data-io: read_anchors(), read_genotype(), simulate_aapa_data()
